subject: [RFC PATCH 05/45] mm: vmstat: restore per-migratetype free counts in /proc/pagetypeinfo

2026-04-30.patch_summary: This patch restores the display of per-migratetype free counts in /proc/pagetypeinfo, which was broken by the SPB rework. The counts are accumulated from the per-superpageblock free lists and then emitted as one line per migratetype. To avoid time under the lock, the zone->lock is dropped between superpageblocks, allowing for concurrent memory hotplug to swap zone->superpageblocks during a lock drop. This patch is intended for a debug-only interface and does not guarantee consistent counts in such scenarios.
